generated_oml:
instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, CraneController
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane physical component"
]

instance CraneController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller for the physical gantry crane"
]

instance RaspberryPiSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi-based sensors capturing physical crane state data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RaspberryPiSensor
    base:desc "Crane state data transmitted via MQTT protocol"
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state data including position, velocity, and operational metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HistoricalDataLoggingEnabler, RealTimeVisualizationEnabler, OptimalControlEnabler, ContinuousValidationEnabler
]

instance AutomationMLModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "AutomationML-based digital twin model for gantry crane system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationEnabler, OptimalControlEnabler, GitHubEnabler
]

instance ContinuousValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for continuous validation using AutomationML model"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]

instance OptimalControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for optimal control of crane operation"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB-based historical data logging system"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization service using Microsoft Azure tools"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance GitHubEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GitHub version control system for digital twin model"
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelVersioningService
]

instance ContainerizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization for deployment of digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentService
]

instance AzureEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Microsoft Azure tools for pipeline implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables AzurePipelineService
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control service for crane operation to manage airflow and virus spread"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneOptimalControlInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for operational metrics"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalMetricsInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization service for indoor air quality management"
    DTDFVocab:provides IndoorAirQualityVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation service for simulation and prediction capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight, PredictionInsight
]

instance ModelVersioningService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model versioning service using GitHub"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelVersioningInsight
]

instance DeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Deployment service using containerization"
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentInsight
]

instance AzurePipelineService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Azure pipeline implementation service"
    DTDFVocab:provides AzurePipelineInsight
]

instance IndoorAirQualityVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of indoor air quality metrics for virus spread prevention"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation of virus spread scenarios based on indoor air quality data"
]

instance PredictionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Prediction of virus spread risks for preventive strategies"
]

instance CraneOptimalControlInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized crane movement for controlling indoor air quality and reducing virus spread"
]

instance OperationalMetricsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical operational metrics analysis for system evolution studies"
]

instance ModelVersioningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Model version tracking and management insights"
]

instance DeploymentInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Containerized deployment status and performance insights"
]

instance AzurePipelineInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Azure pipeline execution and monitoring insights"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Trajectory commands generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are processed by the Control Application (Python), which sends control instructions via the Physical Crane Interface to the physical crane. Command formats, validation, authentication, and feedback mechanisms are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system features an AutomationML-based digital twin model, a Raspberry-Pi sensor system for the physical component, and Microsoft Azure tools for implementing the digital twin pipeline."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system utilizes an MQTT broker for communication between digital twin services. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability, redundancy, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with Microsoft Azure cloud services for digital twin pipeline implementation and data processing."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adheres to the AutomationML standard for digital twin modeling and utilizes Microsoft Azure tools for pipeline implementation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The Continuous Validation Service continuously compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations, calculates distance metrics against an acceptable threshold, and notifies operators via the dashboard when breaches occur; the physical crane system is designed to operate independently of the digital twin for continued functionality."
]
